module_info.docstring:
Module for extracting documentation from package websites and converting to markdown.
Improved with better error handling, performance optimizations, and integration
with logging and token tracking systems.

classes.name: DocumentationExtractionError
classes.docstring: Base exception for documentation extraction errors.

classes.name: URLDiscoveryError
classes.docstring: Exception raised when documentation URL cannot be found.

classes.name: ContentExtractionError
classes.docstring: Exception raised when content extraction fails.

classes.name: MarkdownConversionError
classes.docstring: Exception raised when HTML to Markdown conversion fails.

classes.name: DocumentationExtractor
classes.docstring: Extracts documentation from package websites and converts to markdown.

methods.name: __init__
methods.docstring:
Initialize the documentation extractor.

Args:
    output_dir: Directory to store extracted documentation
    cache_dir: Directory to cache intermediate results (optional)
    concurrency_limit: Maximum number of concurrent extraction operations
    use_vision: Whether to use vision capabilities for browser automation

methods.name: _create_rate_limiter
methods.docstring: Create a token bucket rate limiter.

methods.name: find_documentation_url
methods.docstring:
Find the documentation URL for a package using multiple strategies.

Args:
    package_name: Name of the package
    
Returns:
    URL of the documentation site if found, None otherwise

methods.name: _try_pypi_api
methods.docstring: Try to find documentation URL from PyPI API.

methods.name: _is_valid_url
methods.docstring: Check if a URL is syntactically valid.

methods.name: _try_google_search
methods.docstring: Try to find documentation URL via Google search.

methods.name: _try_github_repo
methods.docstring: Try to find documentation in the GitHub repository if it exists.

methods.name: map_documentation_site
methods.docstring:
Map out a documentation site to find all relevant pages using an AI agent.

Args:
    doc_url: URL of the documentation site
    max_pages: Maximum number of pages to map
    
Returns:
    List of dictionaries with information about documentation pages

methods.name: _hash_url
methods.docstring: Create a simplified hash of a URL for caching.

methods.name: _parse_agent_site_mapping
methods.docstring:
Parse the agent's output to extract structured site mapping.

Args:
    content: Agent's output content
    visited_urls: List of URLs visited by the agent
    base_domain: Base domain of the documentation site
    doc_url: Original documentation URL
    
Returns:
    List of page dictionaries with url, title, and priority

methods.name: extract_content_from_page
methods.docstring:
Extract the main content from a documentation page using an AI agent.

Args:
    url: URL of the documentation page
    package_name: Name of the package
    
Returns:
    HTML content of the main documentation area

methods.name: _improve_code_blocks
methods.docstring: Improve the formatting of code blocks in HTML content.

methods.name: convert_html_to_markdown
methods.docstring:
Convert HTML content to Markdown.

Args:
    html: HTML content
    url: Source URL (for reference)
    
Returns:
    Markdown representation of the HTML content

methods.name: _improve_markdown_code_blocks
methods.docstring: Improve the formatting of code blocks in Markdown content.

methods.name: process_package_documentation
methods.docstring:
Process the documentation for a package.

Args:
    package: Package object
    force_extract: Force extraction even if documentation already exists
    
Returns:
    Path to the generated combined markdown file

methods.name: _process_page_safe
methods.docstring: Process a single page with error handling.
